situation: Sentinel v2 has been restarted multiple times due to signal 15, indicating a possible issue with the service. Health server has been listening on port 18799 throughout the day. System metrics indicate low disk usage but moderate memory usage.
observed_signals: Signal 15 received, shutting down Sentinel v2
System metrics indicate low disk usage but moderate memory usage
analysis: The health server has been running continuously on port 18799, but the Sentinel v2 service has been restarted multiple times due to signal 15. This indicates a possible issue with the service. System metrics show low disk usage but moderate memory usage, which may indicate a resource constraint. The recent errors log indicates a single error related to the health server failing due to an address already in use.
anomalies_or_tensions: Health server listening on port 18799 but Sentinel v2 service restarted multiple times
hypotheses: Sentinel v2 service may be experiencing resource issues or configuration errors leading to restarts.
Health server may be experiencing issues with address already in use error.
uncertainties: Uncertainty exists regarding the root cause of the Sentinel v2 restarts.
Uncertainty exists regarding the impact of the health server address already in use error.
watch_items: Sentinel v2 restarts, health server listening on port 18799, system metrics indicate resource constraints
notes_for_main_no1r: Investigate the Sentinel v2 service for resource issues or configuration errors. Monitor system metrics for signs of resource constraints. Review recent errors log for further insights.
safety_note: Simulation only. No external actions taken.
